title: Bitcoin Trader Recovers $400K Wallet After 11 Years with AI Help
summary: A Bitcoin trader recovered $400,000 using AI to crack a wallet password lost 11 years ago. The AI tried 3.5 trillion passwords before succeeding, highlighting the potential of AI in recovering lost crypto assets.
body:
A Bitcoin trader has successfully recovered access to a wallet containing $400,000 after losing the password 11 years ago. The trader used AI, specifically Claude, to crack the password by trying 3.5 trillion possible combinations. This breakthrough demonstrates the growing capabilities of AI in solving complex problems related to lost or forgotten crypto assets.

The trader had a backup of the wallet but couldn't remember the password, leaving the funds inaccessible for over a decade. The AI's brute-force method involved systematically testing a vast number of potential passwords until the correct one was found. This process required significant computational power and time, showcasing the persistence and efficiency of modern AI tools.

This success story is significant for everyday crypto users because it offers hope for those who have lost access to their wallets due to forgotten passwords. It also underscores the importance of securing backups and using reliable methods for password recovery. As AI technology continues to advance, it may become a more common tool for recovering lost crypto assets, providing a safety net for users who have made similar mistakes in the past.

This case also highlights the potential risks and ethical considerations surrounding AI-powered password cracking. While it can be a powerful tool for recovering lost funds, it also raises questions about privacy and security. Users should be aware of the capabilities of AI and take appropriate measures to protect their assets, such as using strong, unique passwords and keeping multiple secure backups.

The trader used Claude AI to brute-force the password, showcasing AI's potential in solving complex crypto problems.

This highlights both the promise and risks of AI in crypto. Always secure your backups and use strong passwords. Read more → https://cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-05-17-bitcoin-trader-recovers-400k-wallet-after-11-years-with-ai-help
standaloneTweet: AI just helped a trader recover $400K in Bitcoin after 11 years. The password was cracked after 3.5 trillion attempts.
